## Scope

Describe the behavior and files changed.

## Verification

List exact commands, exit codes, passed/failed/skipped counts, and screenshot/artifact paths.

## Product synchronization

- [ ] PRD updated or no product behavior changed
- [ ] DESIGN updated or no shared visual rule changed
- [ ] OpenDesign and route/state matrix updated or not affected

## Security and data

- [ ] No secrets, DSNs, tokens, user data, or fabricated official data
- [ ] RLS/permissions and migration risks reviewed when applicable

## Unverified

List every remaining unverified path explicitly.
